name: example-feature
summary: One-line description of what this pack adds.

env.name: EXPO_PUBLIC_EXAMPLE_KEY
env.note: Only needed to ship; dev works without it.

postInstall: Pick a backbone (it matches src/shared/lib/backend) and install ONLY that server artifact (see `server`).
[supabase] Apply the migration: copy server/supabase/0010_example.sql into supabase/migrations/ (next number), then `supabase db reset && supabase test db`.
[api] Hand server/api/openapi.yaml + server/api/routes.md to the backend team (the contract + trust rules).
[api] Generate the typed client: `npx orval --config orval.config.ts` after adjusting its input/output paths for this pack (orval + the `api:gen` script are added to package.json by another stream).
[api] Until the real API exists, wire server/api/mock.ts behind the backend-api preset's fetch so the client works in dev.
Add a tab/route entry if the feature needs one.
Replace the placeholder UI after the Claude Design pass.
